title: BIM Coordinator x 3 (Architectural / Structural / 5 days / Islandwide)
description:
• Well established company
  • Basic $3000 - $ 5000 + Variable Bonus
  • Working location: Various location available Islandwide
  • Working days: Monday - Friday
  • Working hours: 9.00am - 6.00pm
  • Candidate with less experience will be consider as a modeller role.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Responsible for ensuring consistent model development, managing interdisciplinary coordination, and maintaining compliance with BIM standards throughout the project lifecycle.
  • Coordinate and manage BIM models across multiple disciplines (Architectural, Structural, MEP).
  • Perform clash detection and resolution using tools such as Navisworks and/or Revit.
  • Ensure that all BIM models are developed in accordance with the BIM Execution Plan (BEP) and project standards.
  • Collaborate with design and construction teams to facilitate model-based workflows and information sharing.
  • Review, audit, and validate models for accuracy, completeness, and compliance with project specifications.
  • Manage file exchanges and version control using CDEs (e.g., Autodesk Construction Cloud/BIM 360).
  • Assist in the development and implementation of BIM protocols and standards (e.g., ISO 19650).
  • Support training and mentoring of project staff in BIM tools and processes.
  • Generate reports and visualizations to support coordination and decision-making.
  • Other ad hoc duties as assigned.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Architecture, Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field.
  • Minimum of 2 years of experience in a BIM coordination role.
  • Candidate with less experience will be consider as a modeller role.


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


NG JYA YEE (R23119014)
EA Recruitment Pte Ltd
EA License No: 21C0492
